query:
DELETE FROM blog_categories;

-- Final verification counts
SELECT 'consultations' AS tbl, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM consultations
UNION ALL SELECT 'consultation_questions', COUNT(*) FROM consultation_questions
UNION ALL SELECT 'consultation_attached_records', COUNT(*) FROM consultation_attached_records
UNION ALL SELECT 'user_medical_records', COUNT(*) FROM user_medical_records
UNION ALL SELECT 'videos', COUNT(*) FROM videos
UNION ALL SELECT 'podcasts', COUNT(*) FROM podcasts
UNION ALL SELECT 'blog_posts', COUNT(*) FROM blog_posts
UNION ALL SELECT 'blog_categories', COUNT(*) FROM blog_categories
UNION ALL SELECT 'research_topics', COUNT(*) FROM research_topics
UNION ALL SELECT 'satisfaction_surveys', COUNT(*) FROM satisfaction_surveys
UNION ALL SELECT 'watch_history', COUNT(*) FROM watch_history
UNION ALL SELECT 'users', COUNT(*) FROM users;
